title: rubus rivularis var. incultus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. incultus, also known as wild bramble or blackberry bramble, is a variant of the Rubus rivularis plant, which is native to certain regions and is a type of wild blackberry. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. incultus include its ability to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems.
